headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 3, 2026**
article:
The New York Yankees secured a 9-4 victory over the Baltimore Orioles, with Cody Bellinger leading the Yankees' offense with 4 hits, 2 home runs, and 4 RBIs. The Toronto Blue Jays dominated the Minnesota Twins, securing an 11-4 victory, while the Cleveland Guardians routed the Athletics 14-6. The Arizona Diamondbacks fell short in Chicago, losing 0-2 to the Cubs.

Several key players have been sidelined due to injuries. Will Wilson, the Seattle Mariners' third baseman, has been placed on the 10-day injured list with a left thumb fracture, effective retroactive to April 30, 2026. Other players to suffer injuries include Cole Sands (Minnesota Twins), Matt Brash (Seattle Mariners), Ryan Helsley (Baltimore Orioles), Brandon Woodruff (Milwaukee Brewers), Kyle Backhus (Philadelphia Phillies), Luis Robert Jr. (New York Mets), and Brandon Williamson (Cincinnati Reds).

The Detroit Tigers have bolstered their roster with the addition of infielder Zack Short, acquired from the Washington Nationals in exchange for cash. The Los Angeles Dodgers acquired 2B Tyler Fitzgerald from the Toronto Blue Jays for cash, while the Toronto Blue Jays also acquired C Willie MacIver from the Texas Rangers in a separate trade. The Seattle Mariners traded RHP Casey Legumina to the Tampa Bay Rays for RHP Ty Cummings.

top_news.title: **Yankees Take Down Orioles 9-4**
top_news.summary: The New York Yankees secured a 9-4 victory over the Baltimore Orioles, with Ryan Weathers earning the win after 5.0 innings of work. Cody Bellinger led the Yankees' offense with 4 hits, 2 home runs, and 4 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays Blast Past Twins 11-4**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays dominated the Minnesota Twins, securing an 11-4 victory. Brandon Valenzuela led the Blue Jays' offense with a home run and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Fall Short in Chicago**
top_news.summary: The Arizona Diamondbacks were defeated by the Chicago Cubs with a final score of 0-2. Ian Happ led the Cubs' offense with a 3-hit performance, including a home run and an RBI.

top_news.title: **Cleveland Guardians Rout Athletics 14-6**
top_news.summary: The Cleveland Guardians dominated the Athletics, securing a 14-6 victory. Shea Langeliers led the Athletics' offense with 3 hits, 2 home runs, and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Mariners' Will Wilson Sidelined with Thumb Fracture**
top_news.summary: Seattle Mariners third baseman Will Wilson has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a left thumb fracture, effective retroactive to April 30, 2026.

top_news.title: **Tigers Acquire Zack Short in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Detroit Tigers have bolstered their roster with the addition of infielder Zack Short, acquired from the Washington Nationals in exchange for cash.
